_comment: Initial sync-definition flow templates. These seed DB-backed sync definition config rows and scaffolded repo drafts; after operators edit/save, DB becomes the source of truth.

contract.label: Contract deploy
contract.description: Metadata sync plus full contract deployment, ETL, routines, and deploy stamps.

steps.title: Audit check
steps.description: Validate target state before contract sync.

steps.title: Target lock
steps.description: Lock the target contract deployment window.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected contract scope.

steps.title: Pipeline register
steps.description: Register affected pipelines with the target agent service.

steps.title: Contract undeploy
steps.description: Undeploy the target contract before redeployment.

steps.title: Unlock after undeploy
steps.description: Unlock the contract after undeploy.

steps.title: Pre-deploy audit check
steps.description: Run a second contract audit check before deployment.

steps.title: Lock for deploy
steps.description: Lock the contract for deployment.

steps.title: Pre-deploy script
steps.description: Run contract pre-deployment scripts.

steps.title: Create stage dataset
steps.description: Create the stage dataset.

steps.title: Create archive dataset
steps.description: Create the archive dataset.

steps.title: Create list dataset
steps.description: Create the list dataset.

steps.title: Create dim dataset
steps.description: Create the dimension dataset.

steps.title: Create fact dataset
steps.description: Create the fact dataset.

steps.title: Create dataset FKs
steps.description: Reconcile contract dataset foreign keys.

steps.title: Deploy ETL
steps.description: Deploy ETL custom transformations.

steps.title: Deploy routines
steps.description: Deploy contract routines.

steps.title: Post-deploy script
steps.description: Run contract post-deployment scripts.

steps.title: Unlock after deploy
steps.description: Unlock the contract after deployment.

steps.title: Sync date
steps.description: Stamp the contract sync date.

steps.title: Deploy date
steps.description: Stamp the contract deploy date.

dataset.label: Dataset deploy
dataset.description: Metadata sync followed by dataset deployment on the target ETL service.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected dataset scope.

steps.title: Dataset deploy
steps.description: Deploy the dataset using the target ETL service.

steps.title: Sync date
steps.description: Stamp the dataset sync date after deployment.

rule.label: Rule deploy
rule.description: Metadata sync, dependent dataset deploy, rule deploy, and dependency refresh.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected rule scope.

steps.title: Dataset deploy
steps.description: Deploy datasets required by the rule on the target ETL service.

steps.title: Rules deploy
steps.description: Deploy the rule package on the target ETL service.

steps.title: Handle dependencies
steps.description: Refresh direct dependency state after rule deployment.

steps.title: Sync date
steps.description: Stamp the rule sync date.

steps.title: Deploy date
steps.description: Stamp the rule deploy date.

pipelineActivity.label: Pipeline register
pipelineActivity.description: Metadata sync followed by registering the target pipeline with the agent service.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected pipeline activity scope.

steps.title: Pipeline register
steps.description: Register the target pipeline with the agent service.

gateMetadata.label: Gate refresh
gateMetadata.description: Metadata sync followed by gate metadata refresh and downstream pipeline start.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected gate metadata scope.

steps.title: Meta refresh
steps.description: Refresh target gate metadata.

steps.title: Pipeline start
steps.description: Start the downstream gate refresh pipeline.

content.label: Content dependencies
content.description: Metadata sync followed by downstream dependency refresh for content entities.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected content scope.

steps.title: Handle dependencies
steps.description: Refresh downstream content dependency state.

metadata-only.label: Metadata only
metadata-only.description: Only apply metadata changes; do not trigger downstream deploy or refresh steps.

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected entity scope.
